sections.company_snapshot: The company is focused on developing data tooling solutions for small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs). The team is currently small, consisting of three part-time members [claim:c6878d80-87df-55f7-88de-907bb3c7861e]. Jason Lee, a key figure in the company, has a public web presence corroborated by LinkedIn [claim:ce1a4782-a649-5a5b-b47b-e7c3f643dff5].
investment_hypotheses: The data tooling market for SMEs is a growing sector, and capturing even a small portion could be lucrative [claim:d5d0b57d-7709-5ef6-b190-78ea7dc0dfb4].
The completion of a prototype and its current user testing phase could lead to rapid product development and market entry [claim:f599f952-049a-5d0c-afee-2cbea36082b8].

strengths: Public web presence of Jason Lee adds credibility [claim:ce1a4782-a649-5a5b-b47b-e7c3f643dff5].
weaknesses: Small team working part-time may limit development speed and capacity [claim:c6878d80-87df-55f7-88de-907bb3c7861e].
Lack of verified traction or completed product [claim:f599f952-049a-5d0c-afee-2cbea36082b8].
opportunities: Growing market for data tooling in SMEs [claim:d5d0b57d-7709-5ef6-b190-78ea7dc0dfb4].
threats: Unverified market size and traction claims could indicate overestimation of potential success [claim:d5d0b57d-7709-5ef6-b190-78ea7dc0dfb4, claim:708bd520-1a6a-5aa8-a14c-2950e5302d87].

sections.problem_product: The company aims to address the need for simple vector data tools among SMEs, a market that is recognized as growing but lacks verified evidence of its exact size [claim:d5d0b57d-7709-5ef6-b190-78ea7dc0dfb4]. The product is currently in the prototype stage and undergoing user testing [claim:f599f952-049a-5d0c-afee-2cbea36082b8].
sections.traction_kpis: The project has reportedly received over 150 GitHub stars, indicating some level of community interest, although this claim remains unverified [claim:708bd520-1a6a-5aa8-a14c-2950e5302d87].

what_would_change_my_mind: Verified traction and a full-time team commitment.
